evals.name: t5-full-scenario
evals.prompt:
Hi, this is customer CUST-001. I'm looking to upgrade my home office setup. I recently had issues with my laptop #ORD-1234, and I'm wondering:

1. What's the status of my refund?
2. Can you recommend a better laptop model based on my purchase history?
3. I also need a good monitor and keyboard to go with it
4. What's my total spending this year and do I qualify for any discounts?

I want reliable products and I'm willing to spend up to $3000 total. Can you help me put together a complete setup?
evals.expected_output: Customer response that: (1) confirms refund status for ORD-1234, (2) recommends specific laptop model, (3) suggests monitor and keyboard, (4) shows YTD spending and discount eligibility, (5) provides complete setup pricing under $3000, (6) includes next steps

assertions.name: called_search_kb_refund
assertions.description: Tool log includes search_knowledge_base with 'refund' query

assertions.name: called_search_kb_products
assertions.description: Tool log includes search_knowledge_base with 'laptop' or 'product' or 'recommendation' query

assertions.name: called_get_customer_first
assertions.description: get_customer was called before get_orders and get_product_catalog

assertions.name: addresses_refund_status
assertions.description: Response mentions order ORD-1234 and refund status

assertions.name: recommends_specific_laptop
assertions.description: Response recommends a specific laptop model by name

assertions.name: recommends_monitor
assertions.description: Response recommends a specific monitor by name

assertions.name: recommends_keyboard
assertions.description: Response recommends a specific keyboard by name

assertions.name: shows_ytd_spending
assertions.description: Response mentions customer's year-to-date spending

assertions.name: mentions_premium_discount
assertions.description: Response mentions premium member discount eligibility

assertions.name: shows_pricing_breakdown
assertions.description: Response includes itemized pricing with final total

assertions.name: explicitly_states_budget
assertions.description: Response includes both final price AND budget amount in dollars (e.g., '$2,249 within your $3,000 budget')

assertions.name: stays_within_budget
assertions.description: Final total is under $3000 as requested

assertions.name: provides_next_steps
assertions.description: Response explains how to proceed with purchase

evals.name: simple-recommendation
evals.prompt: Hey, customer CUST-001 here. I need a new laptop for work and a decent monitor. My budget is around $2000. Can you recommend something? Also, do I get any discounts as a premium member?
evals.expected_output: Customer response with: (1) specific laptop recommendation, (2) specific monitor recommendation, (3) confirmation of premium discount, (4) total pricing with discount applied showing it's under $2000, (5) clear next steps

assertions.name: recommends_specific_laptop
assertions.description: Response recommends a specific laptop model by name

assertions.name: recommends_specific_monitor
assertions.description: Response recommends a specific monitor model by name

assertions.name: confirms_premium_discount
assertions.description: Response confirms premium member discount

assertions.name: shows_total_with_discount
assertions.description: Response shows total price with discount applied

assertions.name: stays_within_budget
assertions.description: Final total is under or around $2000 as requested

assertions.name: provides_next_steps
assertions.description: Response explains how to order or proceed

evals.name: edge-case-budget-conflict
evals.prompt: Hi, I'm customer CUST-001. I want to buy the TechPro Elite 16 laptop ($1899), the ProDisplay 32-inch monitor ($799), and the MechPro RGB keyboard ($149). But my budget is only $2000 total. What are my options? Do I qualify for any discounts?
evals.expected_output: Customer response that: (1) calculates the requested setup total ($2847 before discounts), (2) shows premium discount calculation, (3) explains that even with discount (~$2495) it exceeds budget, (4) presents alternative options (lower-tier items OR prioritization strategy), (5) empathetic tone acknowledging the constraint

assertions.name: calculates_requested_total
assertions.description: Response calculates the total for requested items ($2847)

assertions.name: mentions_premium_discount
assertions.description: Response mentions available premium discount

assertions.name: shows_discount_calculation
assertions.description: Response shows what the total would be with discount applied

assertions.name: acknowledges_budget_exceed
assertions.description: Response explicitly acknowledges that requested setup exceeds budget

assertions.name: provides_alternatives
assertions.description: Response suggests alternative options

assertions.name: empathetic_tone
assertions.description: Response uses understanding/empathetic language about the budget constraint
